news.title:
UBS maintains Buy on Delhivery with a Rs 600 target as key headwinds fade.
Valmo, quick-commerce impact priced in; PTL margin growth supports profitability shift.
news.summary:
UBS maintains Buy on Delhivery with a Rs 600 target as key headwinds fade.
Valmo, quick-commerce impact priced in; PTL margin growth supports profitability shift.

news.title:
Brokerages analyze stocks like Infosys, Delhivery, Bharat Electronics; Infosys acquisitions flagged for risks but seen strengthening healthcare capabilities.
Brokerages favor Nifty Bank for risk-reward; Goldman Sachs downgrades India citing energy prices, while Kotak adjusts mid/large-cap portfolios.
news.summary:
Brokerages analyze stocks like Infosys, Delhivery, Bharat Electronics; Infosys acquisitions flagged for risks but seen strengthening healthcare capabilities.
Brokerages favor Nifty Bank for risk-reward; Goldman Sachs downgrades India citing energy prices, while Kotak adjusts mid/large-cap portfolios.

news.title:
Markets rallied for a second session; Nifty rose 1.7% to 23,306.45, led by realty, metal, and financials.
Stock picks: BSE (Buy, Target ₹3,070), Delhivery (Buy, Target ₹458), Glenmark Pharma (Buy, Target ₹2,330).
news.summary:
Markets rallied for a second session; Nifty rose 1.7% to 23,306.45, led by realty, metal, and financials.
Stock picks: BSE (Buy, Target ₹3,070), Delhivery (Buy, Target ₹458), Glenmark Pharma (Buy, Target ₹2,330).

news.title:
NCLT approves Delhivery's merger with Spoton Logistics & Spoton Supply Chain Solutions, effective April 1, 2025.
The merger aims to streamline operations, reduce costs, and enhance efficiency under a unified structure.
news.summary:
NCLT approves Delhivery's merger with Spoton Logistics & Spoton Supply Chain Solutions, effective April 1, 2025.
The merger aims to streamline operations, reduce costs, and enhance efficiency under a unified structure.

news.title:
Delhivery appoints Ms. Neelam Dhawan as Independent Director and Chairperson from Apr 1, 2026.
Ms. Dhawan, with 30 years of tech leadership, succeeds Mr. Deepak Kapoor after 8+ years.
news.summary:
Delhivery appoints Ms. Neelam Dhawan as Independent Director and Chairperson from Apr 1, 2026.
Ms. Dhawan, with 30 years of tech leadership, succeeds Mr. Deepak Kapoor after 8+ years.

news.title:
Delhivery expands Economy Air Parcel Service to UK, Canada, Australia.
Supports MSME exports with tech-enabled shipping, competitive rates, customs automation.
news.summary:
Delhivery expands Economy Air Parcel Service to UK, Canada, Australia.
Supports MSME exports with tech-enabled shipping, competitive rates, customs automation.

news.title:
Ecom Express, Delhivery's subsidiary, faces a tax demand of ₹52.78M.
Tax relates to FY19-20; appeal planned, with no material impact reported.
news.summary:
Ecom Express, Delhivery's subsidiary, faces a tax demand of ₹52.78M.
Tax relates to FY19-20; appeal planned, with no material impact reported.

news.title: Morgan Stanley retains Equal Weight on Delhivery, raising target to 470 from 445.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley retains Equal Weight on Delhivery, raising target to 470 from 445.

news.title:
India's $30bn e-commerce shift sees modular tools like Shiprocket, Razorpay, and Delhivery enabling brands to build custom setups.
These platforms offer flexible logistics, payments, and warehousing, empowering sellers to expand globally while infrastructure firms capture new revenue streams.
news.summary:
India's $30bn e-commerce shift sees modular tools like Shiprocket, Razorpay, and Delhivery enabling brands to build custom setups.
These platforms offer flexible logistics, payments, and warehousing, empowering sellers to expand globally while infrastructure firms capture new revenue streams.

news.title:
Delhivery partners with NVIDIA to enhance AI-based mapping for India's complex geography.
It utilizes NVIDIA tech to improve address accuracy, optimize delivery routes, and tackle unstructured addressing.
news.summary:
Delhivery partners with NVIDIA to enhance AI-based mapping for India's complex geography.
It utilizes NVIDIA tech to improve address accuracy, optimize delivery routes, and tackle unstructured addressing.

news.title:
Cochin Shipyard wins ₹5,000 crore Navy vessel contract; Lupin partners with Spektus Pharma for DeslaFlex in Canada.
JSW Infra plans equity raising; Delhivery to deploy 150 EVs; Embassy Developments enters Alibaug market with luxury project.
news.summary:
Cochin Shipyard wins ₹5,000 crore Navy vessel contract; Lupin partners with Spektus Pharma for DeslaFlex in Canada.
JSW Infra plans equity raising; Delhivery to deploy 150 EVs; Embassy Developments enters Alibaug market with luxury project.

news.title:
Jefferies upgrades Delhivery to 'Buy' from 'Underperform' with TP raised to Rs 525.
Earlier target price was Rs 360, reflecting increased confidence in Delhivery's prospects.
news.summary:
Jefferies upgrades Delhivery to 'Buy' from 'Underperform' with TP raised to Rs 525.
Earlier target price was Rs 360, reflecting increased confidence in Delhivery's prospects.

news.title:
Delhivery aims to reduce corporate costs to 6%-7% from 9.1% by Q3 FY26.
The company targets free cash flow break-even at ~6% adjusted EBITDA margin.
news.summary:
Delhivery aims to reduce corporate costs to 6%-7% from 9.1% by Q3 FY26.
The company targets free cash flow break-even at ~6% adjusted EBITDA margin.

news.title:
Delhivery projects 20% long-term volume growth despite quarterly fluctuations.
PTL margins expected to rise from 11% to over 16% due to better network use, pricing.
news.summary:
Delhivery projects 20% long-term volume growth despite quarterly fluctuations.
PTL margins expected to rise from 11% to over 16% due to better network use, pricing.

news.title:
Delhivery expects CAPEX to drop to 4%-4.4% over 7-10 quarters.
Express parcel volume growth forecasted at 15%-20%, possibly exceeding 20%.
news.summary:
Delhivery expects CAPEX to drop to 4%-4.4% over 7-10 quarters.
Express parcel volume growth forecasted at 15%-20%, possibly exceeding 20%.

news.title:
Delhivery shares rose 5% in 2 days post Q3FY26 results.
At 9:22 AM, Delhivery traded 2.1% higher at ₹445.3 per share.
news.summary:
Delhivery shares rose 5% in 2 days post Q3FY26 results.
At 9:22 AM, Delhivery traded 2.1% higher at ₹445.3 per share.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty indicates a flat market start ahead of Union Budget 2026; key stocks include Meesho, Bajaj Auto, IDBI Bank, and Delhivery.
Nifty fell 0.39% to 25,320.65; Sensex dropped 0.36% to 82,269.78 in the last session. PSU Bank & Defence sectors in focus.
news.summary:
GIFT Nifty indicates a flat market start ahead of Union Budget 2026; key stocks include Meesho, Bajaj Auto, IDBI Bank, and Delhivery.
Nifty fell 0.39% to 25,320.65; Sensex dropped 0.36% to 82,269.78 in the last session. PSU Bank & Defence sectors in focus.

news.title:
Delhivery reports Q3FY26 revenue of Rs.2,798 Cr, up 18% YoY, 10% QoQ.
Service EBITDA exceeds Rs.1,000 Cr; PAT Rs.40 Cr post-integration costs in Q3FY26.
news.summary:
Delhivery reports Q3FY26 revenue of Rs.2,798 Cr, up 18% YoY, 10% QoQ.
Service EBITDA exceeds Rs.1,000 Cr; PAT Rs.40 Cr post-integration costs in Q3FY26.

news.title:
Sun Pharma, GAIL India, IDFC First Bank, Birla Corporation, and others to announce Q3 results today, 31st Jan.
Companies like Bharat Dynamics, Delhivery, and Zen Technologies are also set to release Q3 financials.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma, GAIL India, IDFC First Bank, Birla Corporation, and others to announce Q3 results today, 31st Jan.
Companies like Bharat Dynamics, Delhivery, and Zen Technologies are also set to release Q3 financials.

news.title:
Sun Pharma's Q3 revenue estimated at Rs 14,792 crore, up 8% YoY; profit at Rs 3,035 crore, up 4%.
IDFC First Bank profit up 57.5% YoY; Delhivery revenue up 17%, profit doubles; CDSL sees modest gains.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma's Q3 revenue estimated at Rs 14,792 crore, up 8% YoY; profit at Rs 3,035 crore, up 4%.
IDFC First Bank profit up 57.5% YoY; Delhivery revenue up 17%, profit doubles; CDSL sees modest gains.
